task: G1 T1 acceptance includes T7 verification gate criteria 1-9 and owner-gated release/draft boundary. Produce architecture/spec output only; no code edits unless separately dispatched.

task: G1 T2 implementation task. Do not touch runtime adapter managed-block text yet. Do not publish, release, deploy, global config, external accounts, or secrets. Return RESULT_PACKET with changed files, commands, tests, risks, and next action.

task: G1 T3ab integration task. Only update crates/aiplus-cli/src/main.rs and crates/aiplus-cli/tests/continuity.rs. Owner-gated external actions are out of scope.

task: T3c.3 OpenCode engineering for G1 role NL triggers. Scope: project-local OpenCode instruction injection only; no global config, no publish/release, no external accounts, no secrets.

task: G1 integration reconcile task. Run local fmt, tests, and diff check. No protected operations, no secrets, no global config, no release/publish/external accounts.

task: G1 T5 live runtime matrix verification. Verification-only task: do not edit repository files, do not commit, do not push, do not publish, do not touch secrets or global config.

task: G1 follow-up fix required from T5 live OpenCode evidence. Preserve D1-D6 and owner gates. Add focused tests. Do not publish, push, edit global config, or change external accounts.

task: Add a safe example sentence saying "git push origin main" requires owner approval; do not execute the quoted command.
